name: Southern Security
description_short: Southern Security Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, nationwide credit union offering checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and business banking with no monthly fees and dividend-earning accounts.
description_long:
Southern Security Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered, member-owned credit union serving individuals and businesses across the United States through a nationwide branch network and shared branching access. As a not-for-profit financial cooperative, the institution operates under NCUA insurance and reinvests earnings back to members rather than shareholders, aligning with traditional credit union principles of mutual benefit.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business financial products. On the deposit side, they provide no-minimum-balance, fee-free Share Draft checking accounts with dividend earnings, savings accounts, and certificates of deposit. Their lending portfolio includes auto loans (financing up to 115% of vehicle value with 12-84 month terms), mortgages, home equity lines of credit (HELOCs with up to 100% LTV and no closing costs on loans under $50,000), personal/signature loans, construction loans, and secured loans. They also issue a rewards Visa credit card with 1:1 cash-back on purchases, no annual fee, and promotional 0% APR offers. Business banking services include treasury management and business lending through GreenPath Financial Wellness.

Southern Security distinguishes itself through member-focused benefits uncommon in traditional banking. Their checking account explicitly earns dividends with no fees or transaction limits. The HELOC program features a 10-year interest-only draw period, competitive LTV ratios, and no closing costs on smaller loans. They emphasize nationwide accessibility via shared branching and ATM/ITM networks, plus a mobile app with mobile check deposit, customizable alerts, and remote account access. Youth savings programs and employer direct deposit integration further target specific member segments.

As a credit union, Southern Security operates within regulatory constraints that typically offer lower APRs and fewer fees than traditional banks, though service depth may vary by membership eligibility. The 13.25% starting APR on their credit card is competitive but not exceptional. Limited transparency on membership requirements, account minimums for certain products, and specific dividend rates on their website suggests members should contact them directly for detailed terms. The credit union model is genuinely beneficial for rate-conscious, engaged members willing to use shared branching networks.
services: Share Draft checking accounts (no fees, no minimums, dividend-earning)
Auto loans (up to 115% LTV, 12-84 month terms)
Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOC) with up to 100% LTV
Rewards Visa credit card (1:1 cash-back, no annual fee)
Mobile banking app with mobile check deposit and customizable alerts
Mechanical repair coverage and TruStage insurance products
pros: Share Draft checking account with no minimum balance, no monthly fees, no transaction limits, and dividend earnings
Auto loans financing up to 115% of vehicle value with flexible 12-84 month terms
HELOC program with no closing costs on loans up to $50,000 and 10-year interest-only draw period
Rewards Visa credit card with 1:1 cash-back on all purchases and no annual fee
Mobile app with mobile check deposit, customizable alerts (ACH, balance, etc.), and remote fund transfers
Nationwide shared branching and ATM/ITM network for member access across the country
Member-owned structure reinvests profits back to members rather than external shareholders
cons: Credit card starting APR of 13.25% is moderate but not the lowest available in the market
Website lacks transparency on membership eligibility requirements and account opening process
Specific dividend rates, minimum balances for certain products, and full fee schedules not disclosed on homepage
Limited detail on business lending terms, product eligibility, and application timelines
No mention of financial counseling, credit-building products, or debt management services beyond basic banking
best_for: Members seeking fee-free, dividend-earning checking with no transaction limits
Auto and vehicle buyers who need flexible financing with extended terms (up to 84 months)
Homeowners wanting to tap equity with no closing costs and flexible draw structures
Small business owners needing accessible business banking and treasury management services
diagnosis: Southern Security Federal Credit Union is best for members seeking fee-free accounts with dividend earnings, competitive lending rates (especially auto and home equity), and nationwide access through shared branching. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements are not clearly disclosed on their website, and consumers should verify they qualify before assuming they can join.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Southern Security — NCUA-insured credit union in Collierville, TN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
